description: Connect to the Mundialis OSM WMS service (https://ows.mundialis.de/services/service?) and add the 'OSM-WMS' layer to the current project. Use the image/png format and EPSG:4326 SRS for the layer. Ensure the WMS layer is rendered below the existing 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer. Save the project to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/wms_basemap_project.gvsproj.
